steps.title: Follow the frying chain
steps.content: During frying, water evaporates from the crust, leaving voids that oil can fill. If a food loses less moisture, fewer voids form, so less oil is absorbed into the food.

steps.title: Stay with fat content
steps.content: Choice A adds crispiness, which the passage does not discuss. Choice C adds the rate at which permeability is lost, which is not connected to the blank. Choice D adds frying temperature, also unsupported. The choice about a smaller increase in fat follows from the mechanism. The answer is B.
